properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: John saw a city that could not be hidden, John saw the city, oh yes he did, John caught a glimpse of the golden throne, Tell me all about it, go right on, Around the throne he saw the crystal sea, There's got to be more, what will it be, I want to go to that city he saw New Jerusalem.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jerusalem, I want to walk your streets that are golden, And I want to run where the angels have trod, Jerusalem, I want to rest on the banks of your river, In that city, the city of God.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: John saw the lion lay down by the lamb, I want to know everything about that land, John saw the day but he did not see night, The lamb of God well, he must be the light, And he saw the saints worship the great I am, Crying worthy, worthy is the lamb, I want to go to that city he saw New Jerusalem.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Sing for the night is over, Hosanna in the highest, Hosanna forever, Forever more.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The city of God, Jerusalem, Jerusalem, The city of God, is the city of God.
